properties.address: The George, Newnham, Gloucestershire GL14 1BS GL14 1BS
properties.description: A community owned and run building in our village High Street, offering a community cafe, event and exhibition space and rooms to rent for workshops and private functions and a well stocked 'honesty shop' with donated goods. we also run a 'tool library' where people can register and borrow tools and other useful things in return for a donation.
properties.title: The George
